//: DEBT-3: progressive type-checking for scripts/ (.mjs). tsconfig.json has allowJs:false and only includes src/app, so ~100 backend .mjs files had zero static checking. checkJs is lenient on purpose (strict:false, noImplicitAny:false) — it catches REAL bugs (wrong arg counts, undefined property access, bad returns) without drowning in implicit-any noise. Tighten incrementally via JSDoc. Run: npm run typecheck:scripts. NOT wired into the publish gate (informational/progressive).
